summary: Raise the published CLI Go toolchain floor to 1.26.5 so the GO-2026-5856 crypto/tls fix is enforced by go install.
reason: Go 1.26.5 carries the standard-library fix for GO-2026-5856; the catalog-wide docs floor must match each module go directive so users do not build published CLIs with a vulnerable Go toolchain.
validated_outcome: Bulk verification confirmed all direct published CLI go.mod files declare go 1.26.5 or newer after the sweep.
